research.title: Spec-Driven Development with Spec Kit + Claude Code — Replacing PRDs with Executable Specs
research.whyTrending: GitHub Spec Kit, Kiro, OpenSpec, Tessl, BMAD-METHOD all surged in early 2026. Thoughtworks called SDD one of 2025's defining engineering practices. Constitutional SDD paper (arXiv Feb 2026) formalizes spec-as-prompt with CWE security mappings. Concrete workflow guide is missing.
